summary: Responsiveness testing completed for CRM Global Clean Home. All responsive features verified across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1024px+) viewports. Sidebar toggle, mobile cards, horizontal scroll for Kanban/Planning, and login page adaptations all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsiveness overhaul verified. Key Tailwind breakpoints: sm=640px, md=768px, lg=1024px, xl=1280px. The sidebar uses lg breakpoint (1024px) to show/hide. MobileHeader uses lg:hidden. All pages tested: Dashboard, Leads, Invoices, Kanban, Planning, Integrations, LeadDetail, Login. Mobile cards show instead of tables on md: breakpoint for Leads and Invoices. Kanban has horizontal scroll with -mx-4 px-4 md:mx-0 md:px-0 pattern. Planning calendar has min-w-[640px] wrapper for scroll.

mobile_375px.login_hero_hidden: ✅ PASS - Hero image hidden on mobile

components_verified.Sidebar.js: Mobile drawer with -translate-x-full/lg:translate-x-0, overlay, close button
components_verified.Dashboard.js: grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4, responsive padding p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8
components_verified.Login.js: Logo shown on mobile (lg:hidden), hero hidden on mobile (hidden lg:flex)
components_verified.PlanningCalendar.js: min-w-[640px] wrapper for calendar grid scroll
components_verified.Integrations.js: Tabs with flex-wrap and responsive padding
components_verified.LeadDetail.js: Action buttons with hidden sm:inline for text labels
